description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a prominent display screen and a control panel below it. The front panel showcases a vibrant 'League of Legends' marquee at the top, with colorful artwork and a digital screen displaying the game interface. The control panel is decorated with purple and blue graphics, equipped with multiple buttons and a joystick for gameplay. The side panels are adorned with detailed, high-contrast illustrations of League of Legends characters, adding a dynamic and thematic visual appeal. The cabinet is primarily black, with the artwork and control panel providing vivid color accents. The back of the cabinet is plain and unadorned, emphasizing its functional, upright design.
description: A tall, black arcade game cabinet with League of Legends-themed artwork, a digital display, and a colorful control panel with buttons and a joystick.
description_view_0: Front view showing the League of Legends marquee, digital display screen, and a control panel with buttons and joystick.
description_view_1: Left side view featuring detailed character artwork and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view with different League of Legends character artwork and the angled control panel.
attribute_screen_type: LCD, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple round buttons arranged in a cluster, featuring a purple and blue color scheme with game-themed graphics.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features vibrant League of Legends artwork with character imagery, a fantasy theme, and the game title in bold text on a blue and purple background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, detailed illustrations of League of Legends characters in dynamic poses, using a dark color palette with vivid highlights and fantasy motifs.
